title: MetaPersistence
description: Accumulated artifact history across sessions. Running persistence on THIS produces a barcode of the development process itself — what ideas kept coming back (long bars), what was consistently rejected (short bars), what design patterns are sheaf-consistent across time.

sessions.description: Each session's artifact trail — the geometric qualia of each interaction

raw_cloud.description: L0 snapshot — what the codebase looked like

synthesis_map.description: L2 result — what design was synthesized

routing_trace.description: The sequence of routing decisions — ASCEND/REPROBE/SPLIT at each layer

speculative_rejects.description: What the small model proposed that the large model rejected — the SHORT BARS of inference. Currently thrown away by everyone. We keep them.

meta_barcode.description: Persistence barcode computed ACROSS sessions. Long bars = ideas/patterns that keep emerging. Short bars = one-off noise. This is the topological memory of the development process.

feature.description: What persisted (cluster label, design pattern, etc.)

accumulated_verdicts.description: Every L3 verdict across all sessions. Patterns here reveal: which architectural decisions are consistently ON_SHELL (validated) vs OFF_SHELL (obstructed).

convergence_signature.description: The topological fingerprint of the entire project trajectory. Like the K=200 spectral sum finding its minimum at σ=0.500 — but for development decisions converging on the right architecture.

dominant_clusters.description: Clusters that appear in >50% of sessions (the primes of your development process)

gini_meta_trajectory.description: Gini coefficient across sessions — is the project hierarchifying over time?

sheaf_consistency_rate.description: Fraction of sessions where L3 verdict was ON_SHELL
